name: Tailwind
highlight_text: What it automates best - social posting, scheduling and reporting.
description:
What Tailwind Does

Tailwind is a social media management and automation tool for managing multiple clients’ accounts efficiently. It allows you to centralize social posting, scheduling, and reporting for all your clients. 

With Tailwind, you can automate repetitive tasks such as content curation, scheduling, and publishing contents across popular platforms. You can use it for social platforms like Facebook, Instagram, Pinterest and X.

With the AI assistant, you can publish high quality and fully optimized social contents without putting in many hours. The automation tool also provides analytics and reporting to give you deep insight into your clients’ social performance and engagement on campaigns.

Key Features 

  • Leverages AI assistance for content creation. 
  • Provides social media content calendars. 
  • Provides email marketing creation. 

Benefits of Tailwind 

  • Tailwind can save time and effort by automating repetitive tasks like content creation and scheduling. 
  • With the assistance of AI, you can create high quality social post quickly. 
  • Tailwind helps optimize your campaigns across multiple platforms. 

Pricing

  • $79 per month. 

Pros

  • Automates repetitive tasks to save time. 
  • Intuitive dashboard 
  • AI feature to generate visually appealing social posts. 

Cons

  • Managing clients’ accounts and data on a large scale can become difficult and complicated.
